FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARECONNECT USA HELPLINES FOR FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple helplines where people can speak with experts and get connected to resources for financial issues, including bankruptcy, credit score improvement, foreclosure, mortgage default and delinquency, and debt management for student loans, credit cards, medical bills, and tax-related debt. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 734-2585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial counseling, pre or post-purchase counseling and education, and reverse mortgage counseling. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted, except for reverse mortgage counseling where the homeowner must be age 62 or older with sizable equity in their home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PRE-FILING BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING PRE-DISCHARGE FINANCIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pre-filing bankruptcy counseling and pre-discharge education, both required for filing bankruptcy. 820 Crater Lake Avenue Suite 202 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 779-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial coaching services with information about identifying short and long term financial goals, set spending plans, Individual Development Accounts (IDA), and budget management. Also provides a First Time Home Buyer Program which can help answer questions about the the home buying process, first time home buyer loan programs, building credit scores, and resolving challenges that may prevent homeownership. Also provides a series of workshops around the topics of financial fitness, home buying, Ready to Rent, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 1445 Avalon Street Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 884-0649 121 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers credit counseling and debt repayment counseling. -Credit Counseling: A certified credit counselor meets with the client to review and evaluate the client's current financial situation; develop strategies to manage creditor payments as part of a balanced budget; evaluate personal financial goals; and create an action plan. -Debt Management Program: Offers the implementation of a structured debt management plan (DMP) to pay off debt. Negotiates with the client's creditors for reduced fees and interest for the term of the program. The client makes one monthly payment to the program administrator, which electronically disburses the funds to each creditor. The program continues until the debt is completely paid off. Includes follow-up visits. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial reviews and education in person, over the phone, or online. Services include: -Credit and debt counseling -Bankruptcy counseling -Housing counseling (pre-purchase, foreclosure prevention, and reverse mortgage) -Student loan debt counseling -Debt management plans -Credit report reviews -Foreclosure information -Tips for first-time veteran and military homebuyers 2033 K Street NW Suite 425 Washington, DC 20006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5am-2pm Email (800) 388-2227 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORIMPACT BEND OFFICE HOMESOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers first-time home ownership classes, 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 553-0497 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS ALBANY OFFICE STAND BY ME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF One-on-one financial coaching to set financial goals and make individualized plans to achieve those goals. Financial coaches can provide encouragement; help with the basics of personal finance; assist, develop, and maintain healthy financial habits; offer credit counseling; provide accountability tools; and connect clients with resources and experts. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 924-8440 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEERS OF AMERICA OREGON HOME FREE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a domestic violence and sexual intervention program that includes services such as: -Emergency Services: Hotline, information and referral, and telephone advocacy -Housing Services: Home visits, long-term advocacy and support, help to locate and maintain safe housing -Domestic and sexual violence healthcare and advocacy -Court and legal advocacy with a restraining order hotline -Economic Empowerment: Credit building and repair advocacy, savings, interview skills, employment seekers group, barrier reduction assistance, and Rent Well landlord-tenant education Motel vouchers are only available for those in emergencies who are actively fleeing domestic violence. Availability is dependent upon funding. Eligibility: Survivors of domestic and sexual violence Hours: Emergency Hotline: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Restraining Order Services: Monday-Friday 8am-2pm Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 235-8655 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSUMER CREDIT COUNSELING SERVICE OF SOUTHERN OREGON INC PERSONAL FINANCIAL COUNSELING KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE NEIGHBORIMPACT HOMESOURCE OREGON CASCADES WEST COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS STAND BY ME
